name: wormhook
description: npm/node supply-chain malware scanner for Claude Code. Tiered hook detecting Shai-Hulud (1.0-3.0 + Mini), Axios/DPRK RAT, SANDWORM_MODE, the Hades/PyPI .pth startup-hook wave, and remote-eval loaders via filename, SHA256, and behavioral IOCs. Adds Python (pip/uv) execution gating and a UserPromptSubmit continuous monitor; nudges you to pair it with Socket Firewall + safedep/vet for install-time registry defense.
